```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#.libPaths("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/personal/mmkhan/R/4.1/")
PATH <- "/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo"
FIGURES <- '/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/results/bsanjana_figures'

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(parallel)
library(K2Taxonomer)
library(Biobase)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggrastr)

```

# Analysis of e7386-related samples for immune compartment

If you want to access results from following analysis please refer to `01.e7386_general_analysis.{Rmd.html}`.
1. Creating seurat object from relevant samples.
2. Norm, clustering and dimensionality reduction.
3. singleR cell-type annotation 
4. cluster and trt group level differential and pathway analysis.

This file contains analysis in the immune compartment from samples - ctrl, 4nqo-ctrl, e7386@{25,50} mg/kg with two replicates each. In brief:
1. recluster immune compartment, quantify and find significant cell-types between trt groups
2. annotate cell-types and validate/sub-classify immune sub-types
3. split into adaptive and innate immune system
4. quantify and find significant cell-types between trt groups across coarser/main types
4.1 if significant, find differences between trt groups


## Immune compartment 

```{r eval=F}
e7386_obj <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_09_e7386_seurat_filtered_main_final.rds"))
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
e7386_obj_sub <- subset(e7386_obj, singleRcelltype %ni% c(NA, 'Basophils', 'Microglia'))
e7386_obj_sub$fcm_cell_type <- factor(e7386_obj_sub$fcm_cell_type)
```


### Recluster

```{r eval=FALSE}
e7386_imm <- PercentageFeatureSet(e7386_obj_sub, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
e7386_imm <- NormalizeData(e7386_imm, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
e7386_imm <- FindVariableFeatures(e7386_imm, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(e7386_imm)
e7386_imm <- ScaleData(e7386_imm, all.genes)
#e7386_obj <- RunPCA(e7386_obj, features = VariableFeatures(object = e7386_obj), verbose = FALSE)

```

Explained PC variance

```{r eval=FALSE}
e7386_imm <- SCTransform(e7386_imm, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE)
e7386_imm <- RunPCA(e7386_imm, verbose = FALSE)

ElbowPlot(e7386_imm, reduction = "pca")

mat <- Seurat::GetAssayData(e7386_imm, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")
pca <- e7386_imm[["pca"]]

# Get the total variance:
total_variance <- sum(matrixStats::rowVars(mat))

eigValues = (pca@stdev)^2  ## EigenValues
varExplained = eigValues / total_variance
varExplained
sum(varExplained)
sum(varExplained[1:15])

```

```{r eval=FALSE}
e7386_imm <- RunUMAP(e7386_imm, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)

e7386_imm <- FindNeighbors(e7386_imm, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
e7386_imm <- FindClusters(e7386_imm, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.4, random.seed = 1234, algorithm = "leiden")
e7386_imm$cell_id <- rownames(e7386_imm@meta.data)

saveRDS(e7386_imm, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_13_e7386_imm.rds"))
```

## Load object

```{r}
e7386_imm <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_13_e7386_imm.rds"))
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
#to export - NOTE: only the raw counts were exported to BT due to some issue with SCT normalised counts
rBCS::ExportSeurat(
  object = e7386_imm,
  bcs.path = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_06_13_e7386_imm_BT.bcs"),
  batch.name = "treatment",
  unique.limit = 200,
  raw.rna = "RNA", # Assay that has raw count of RNA
  norm.rna = "RNA", # Assay that has normalized count of RNA  
  overwrite = TRUE # Overwrite existing bcs file
)
```

```{r}
pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'supS4a_imm_UMAP.pdf'))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_imm, label = TRUE, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label.box = TRUE) +
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle(NULL)
rasterize(d, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'supS4a_imm_UMAP_1.5x.pdf'))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_imm, label = TRUE, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label.box = TRUE, label.size = 6) +
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle(NULL) +
  FontSize(
    x.text = 18,
    y.text = 18,
    x.title = 18,
    y.title = 18,
    main = NULL
)
rasterize(d, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'supS4a_imm_UMAP_2x.pdf'))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_imm, label = TRUE, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label.box = TRUE, label.size = 8) +
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle(NULL) +
  FontSize(
    x.text = 24,
    y.text = 24,
    x.title = 24,
    y.title = 24,
    main = NULL
)
rasterize(d, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
```


```{r}
#ggsave(plot = d, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_03_imm_umap_seurat_recluster_seurat_clusters.png"), width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)


d3 <- DimPlot(e7386_imm, label = F, split.by = "treatment")
d3
#ggsave(plot = d3, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/01_13_imm_umap_split_finer.png"), width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)

pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'supS4b_imm_singleR_UMAP.pdf'))
d3 <- DimPlot(e7386_imm, label = T, group.by = "singleRcelltype") +
  NoLegend() + 
  ggtitle(NULL) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial")
  )
rasterize(d3, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
#ggsave(plot = d3, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_03_imm_umap_seurat_recluster_singleRcelltype.png"), width = 7.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Quantify

### Boxplot # of cells

```{r}
df <- data.frame(table(e7386_imm$treatment))
colnames(df) <- c("Treatment", "Number")

g <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = "Treatment", y = "Number")) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  #geom_text(aes(label=Number), vjust=1.6, color="white", size=3.5) +
  geom_label(aes(label=Number), fontface = "bold")
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/imm_barplot.png"), width = 3, height = 2, dpi = 300)
```



```{r relative_proportion_wrapper}
rel_prop <- function(obj, cond1, cond2, cols=NULL) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 1))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "percent")
  
  dat <- dat %>% 
  group_by_at(cond1) %>% 
  mutate(cluster_label_y = 1 - (cumsum(percent) - 0.5 * percent)) %>% 
  ungroup()
  
  d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(cond1, y = "percent", fill = cond2)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_text(aes(y = cluster_label_y, label = round(100 * percent, 2)), col="black", fontface="bold", size=2)+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), text = element_text(family = "Arial"))
  
 # d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes(treatment, y = percent, fill = cell_type)) +
 #  #geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
 #  geom_col(position="fill", width=0.5)+
 #  #theme(aspect.ratio = 3)+
 #  scale_fill_manual(values = c("tomato", "pink",  "green3", "turquoise3", "black", "peru"))+
 #  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
 #  geom_text(aes(y = cluster_label_y, label = round(100 * percent, 2)), size=2, col="black")+ 
 #  theme_bw() +   ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  if(!is.null(cols)){ 
    d <- d1 +  scale_fill_manual(values = cols)
  } else {
    d <- d1
  }
  d
}

```


```{r}
rel_prop(obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "treatment", cond2 = "seurat_clusters")
rel_prop(obj = e7386_imm, cond2 = "treatment", cond1 = "seurat_clusters")
rel_prop(obj = e7386_imm, cond2 = "imm_group", cond1 = "treatment")

r1 <- rel_prop(obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "treatment", cond2 = "singleRcelltype")
r1
#ggsave(plot = r1, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/10_23_imm_prop.png"), width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
rel_prop(obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "singleRcelltype")
```

```{r}
rel_prop_boxplot <- function(obj, cond1, cond2) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 1))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "number")
  #dat$number <- dat$number/sum(dat$number)
  dat$treatment <- meta_data$treatment[match(dat$sample, meta_data$Sample_ID)]
  # dat <- dat %>% 
  # group_by_at(cond1) %>% 
  # mutate(cluster_label_y = 1 - (cumsum(percent) - 0.5 * percent)) %>% 
  # ungroup()

d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = cond2, y = "number", fill = "treatment")) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), legend.position = "bottom")
  
d1
}
```

```{r}
r1 <- rel_prop_boxplot(obj = e7386_imm, cond2 = "singleRcelltype", cond1 = "sample")
r1 
#ggsave(plot = r1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/relprop_box_imm.png"), width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```


## GSVA on new imm sigs

```{r eval=F}
enr_custom <- readxl::read_excel(path = file.path("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/CBMrepositoryData/otherStudies/scRNAseq/lung/2022_08_04_SherrD_SnyderM_10X_0223_CD45+_complete/processed_data/ciber_imm_sigs_mouse_final list for sorting.xlsx"), sheet = 2, range = readxl::cell_rows(1:57))
enr_tcells <- enr_custom

enr_res <- apply(enr_tcells, 2, function(x) toupper(x))
list_enr <- apply(enr_res, 2, function(x) list(x))
list_enr$X <- NULL
#remove NAs
list_enr_new <- lapply(list_enr, function(x) unique(x[[1]])[!is.na(unique(x[[1]]))])

gsva_imm <- GSVA::gsva(expr = e7386_imm@assays$SCT@data, gset.idx.list = list_enr_new)
gsva_imm <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_imm))

gsva_imm$seurat_clusters <- e7386_imm$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(e7386_imm), rownames(gsva_imm))]
#saveRDS(gsva_imm, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/01_13_gsva_imm_cibersort.rds"))
```

```{r}
gsva_imm <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/01_13_gsva_imm_cibersort.rds"))
gsva_imm <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_imm))
gsva_imm <- gsva_imm[match(colnames(e7386_imm), rownames(gsva_imm)),]
gsva_imm$seurat_clusters <- e7386_imm$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(e7386_imm), rownames(gsva_imm))]

gsvaResT <- gsva_imm
condition <- "seurat_clusters"
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")

gsva_mean <- gsvaResFlat %>% group_by(seurat_clusters, pathway)  %>%
    dplyr::summarize(Mean = mean(value, na.rm=TRUE))

transformed_mat <- xtabs(Mean~., gsva_mean)
attr(transformed_mat, "class") <- NULL #ignore this

transformed_mat <- scale(transformed_mat)

cluster_anno <- levels(gsva_mean$seurat_clusters)

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-4, 0, 4), c("green", "white", "red"))

#png(filename = file.path(PATH, "results/gsva_custom.png"), height = 500, width = 700)
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(t(transformed_mat)), name = "Mean GSVA Scores",
        column_split = factor(cluster_anno), col = col_fun,
        cluster_columns = T,
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_column_slices = TRUE,
        column_title_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12),
        column_gap = ggplot2::unit(0.5, "mm"),
        cluster_rows = T,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        #col = col_fun,
        row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12),
        column_title_rot = 90,
        #top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(group=clust),
        show_column_names = FALSE,
        use_raster = TRUE,
        raster_quality = 4)
#dev.off()
```


```{r ftest_wrapper}
ftest_imm <- function(obj, samples, cond1, cond2){
  df1 <- obj@meta.data
  df1 <- df1[df1$treatment %in% samples,]
  df1$treatment <- factor(df1$treatment, levels = samples)
  tmp <- table(df1[,cond1], df1[,cond2])
  df2 <- data.frame(tmp[,1], tmp[,2])
  colnames(df2) <- colnames(tmp)
  df2 <- df2 %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pval=sapply(
    rownames(df2), function(z) fisher.test(table(df1[,cond1]==z,df1[,cond2]))$p.value)) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(qval=p.adjust(pval, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(sig=ifelse(qval<=0.01, "***",  ifelse(qval <= 0.05, "*", ""))) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(pval)
  df2

}

#Fisher's test 
ftest <- fisher.test(table(e7386_imm$singleRcelltype, e7386_imm$treatment), simulate.p.value = T)
ftest
```

### Fishers test

Immune group

```{r}
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO control"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")

ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")

ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"),  obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")
```

```{r}
table(e7386_imm$singleRcelltype, e7386_imm$seurat_clusters)
```


Seurat clusters ~ treatment

```{r}
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO control"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")

ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")

ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"),  obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
```

SingleRcelltype ~ trt

```{r}
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO control"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")

ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")
ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")

ftest_imm(samples = c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"),  obj = e7386_imm, cond1 = "singleRcelltype", cond2 = "treatment")
```


## Table Summary

```{r}
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
library(webshot)
dat_tab1 <- e7386_imm@meta.data[, c('imm_group', 'treatment')]
#dat_tab1 <- dat_tab1 %>% mutate(`Sample_ID` = factor(`Sample_ID`, levels =c("KM_BM_0318_1C", "KM_BM_0319_1", "KM_BM_0318_5NC", "KM_BM_0319_5")))
tbl_summary_2 <- tbl_summary(dat_tab1, by = treatment, percent = "column")

gt2 <- tbl_summary_2  %>%  as_gt()   # convert to gt table

# gt2 %>% tab_options(column_labels.font.size=12) %>% gt::gtsave(# save table as image
#     filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/clust_imm_coarse_tab.png"),
#   ) 
# 
# webshot("../results/e7386_images/clust_imm_coarse_tab.png", "../results/e7386_images/clust_imm_coarse_tab_adj.png", vwidth  = 1000, vheight = 500)

dat_tab1 <- e7386_imm@meta.data[, c('imm_group', 'treatment')]
#dat_tab1 <- dat_tab1 %>% mutate(`Sample_ID` = factor(`Sample_ID`, levels =c("KM_BM_0318_1C", "KM_BM_0319_1", "KM_BM_0318_5NC", "KM_BM_0319_5")))
tbl_summary_2 <- tbl_summary(dat_tab1, by = imm_group, percent = "column")

gt2 <- tbl_summary_2  %>%  as_gt()   # convert to gt table

# gt2 %>% tab_options(column_labels.font.size=12) %>% gt::gtsave(# save table as image
#     filename = "../results/4nqo_e7386_images/clust_imm_coarse_tab_group.png",
#   ) 
# 
# webshot("../results/4nqo_e7386_images/clust_imm_coarse_tab_group.png", "../results/4nqo_e7386_images/clust_imm_coarse_tab_group_adj.png", vwidth  = 1000, vheight = 500)

dat_tab1 <- e7386_imm@meta.data[, c('treatment', 'singleRcelltype')]
#dat_tab1 <- dat_tab1 %>% mutate(`Sample_ID` = factor(`Sample_ID`, levels =c("KM_BM_0318_1C", "KM_BM_0319_1", "KM_BM_0318_5NC", "KM_BM_0319_5")))
tbl_summary_2 <- tbl_summary(dat_tab1, by = treatment, percent = "column")

gt2 <- tbl_summary_2  %>%  as_gt()   # convert to gt table

# gt2 %>% tab_options(column_labels.font.size=11) %>% gt::gtsave(# save table as image
#     filename = "../results/4nqo_e7386_images/trt_singleR_imm_cell_type.png",
#   ) 
# 
# webshot("../results/4nqo_e7386_images/trt_singleR_imm_cell_type.png", "../results/4nqo_e7386_images/trt_singleR_imm_cell_type_adj.png", vwidth  = 1000, vheight = 500)

```

## SingleR using ImmGen

```{r eval=F}
#immgen ref sce
ig <- SingleR::ImmGenData()
rownames(ig) <- toupper(rownames(ig))
labels <- ig$label.main

#e7386 imm
singler_imm <- as.SingleCellExperiment(e7386_imm)
logcounts <- LogNormalize(assay(singler_imm))
assay(singler_imm, "logcounts") <- logcounts
assay(singler_imm, "counts") <- NULL

predicted <- SingleR(test = singler_imm, ref = ig, assay.type.test = 1,labels = labels)
e7386_imm$singleRident <- predicted$labels[match(e7386_imm$cell_id, rownames(predicted))]
e7386_imm$singleRcelltype <- predicted$pruned.labels[match(e7386_imm$cell_id, rownames(predicted))]

table(e7386_imm$singleRcelltype, useNA="ifany")
DimPlot(e7386_imm, reduction = "umap", group.by = "singleRcelltype")
DimPlot(e7386_imm, reduction = "umap", group.by = "singleRcelltype", split.by = "treatment")

e7386_imm <- subset(e7386_imm, singleRcelltype %ni% c("Endothelial cells", "Eosinophils", "Epithelial cells", "Fibroblasts",  "Stem cells", "Stromal cells", "Microglia", NA))
e7386_imm$imm_group <- ifelse(e7386_imm$singleRcelltype %in% c('B cells', 'B cells, pro', 'T cells', 'Tgd'), "Adaptive", "Innate")
#saveRDS(e7386_imm, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_13_e7386_imm.rds"))
```

## FCM

```{r eval=F}
clusters <- levels(e7386_imm$seurat_clusters)
famRes_imm <- do.call(bind_rows, mclapply(clusters, function(clust) {

  clRes <- FindConservedMarkers(e7386_imm,
                                ident.1 = clust,
                                grouping.var = "sample",
                                assay = "SCT",
                                meta.method = metap::maximump,
                                test.use = "MAST",
                                logfc.threshold = 0.25,
                                min.cells.group = 5,
                                only.pos = TRUE,
                                verbose = FALSE)

  if(nrow(clRes) > 0) {
    clRes <- data.frame(cluster = clust, gene = rownames(clRes), clRes)
  } else {
    clRes <- NULL
  }

  return(clRes)

}, mc.cores = 6))

rownames(famRes_imm) <- NULL

# Fix column names
colnames(famRes_imm) <- sub("minimump_", "maximump_", colnames(famRes_imm))

# Fix false discovery rate
famRes_imm$maximump_fdr <- p.adjust(famRes_imm$maximump_p_val, method = "BH")

# Get minimum logFC
famRes_imm$maximump_logFC <- apply(famRes_imm[, grepl("avg_log2FC", colnames(famRes_imm))],  1, min, na.rm = TRUE)

# Sort columns
firstCols <- c(1, 2,
  grep("maximump_", colnames(famRes_imm)),
  grep("max_pval", colnames(famRes_imm)))
lastCols <- seq(ncol(famRes_imm))[!seq(ncol(famRes_imm)) %in% firstCols]
famRes_mod_imm <- famRes_imm[, c(firstCols, lastCols)]

famRes_mod_imm
write.csv(famRes_mod_imm, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/01_13_fcm_e7386_imm.csv"))
```

## Innate

Recluster

```{r eval=F}
e7386_imm_inn <- subset(e7386_imm, imm_group == "Innate")

e7386_imm_inn <- PercentageFeatureSet(e7386_imm_inn, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
e7386_imm_inn <- NormalizeData(e7386_imm_inn, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
e7386_imm_inn <- FindVariableFeatures(e7386_imm_inn, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(e7386_imm_inn)
e7386_imm_inn <- ScaleData(e7386_imm_inn, all.genes)
#e7386_obj <- RunPCA(e7386_obj, features = VariableFeatures(object = e7386_obj), verbose = FALSE)


# run sctransform
e7386_imm_inn <- SCTransform(e7386_imm_inn, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE)
e7386_imm_inn <- RunPCA(e7386_imm_inn, verbose = FALSE)
ElbowPlot(e7386_imm_inn)

e7386_imm_inn <- RunUMAP(e7386_imm_inn, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)

e7386_imm_inn <- FindNeighbors(e7386_imm_inn, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
e7386_imm_inn <- FindClusters(e7386_imm_inn, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.4, random.seed = 5678, algorithm = "leiden")

#saveRDS(e7386_imm_inn, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_30_e7386_imm_inn.RDS"))

```

```{r}
e7386_imm_inn <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_30_e7386_imm_inn.RDS"))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_imm_inn, label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
d
#ggsave(plot = d, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/imm_inn_umap_seurat_recluster.png"), width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

DimPlot(e7386_imm_inn, label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
DimPlot(e7386_imm_inn, label = TRUE, group.by = "singleRcelltype")
d3 <- DimPlot(e7386_imm_inn, label = F, group.by = "singleRcelltype", split.by = "treatment", label.size = 2.5)
d3
#ggsave(plot = d3, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/imm_innate_umap_split_finer.png"), width = 13, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rel_prop(obj = e7386_imm_inn, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "singleRcelltype")
```

```{r}
ge_boxplot <- function(genes, obj, cond, ncol, lev, title){
  df <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(obj@assays$RNA@scale.data[c(genes),])))
  condition <- cond
  #cond <- apply(obj[, cond, drop = FALSE], 1, paste, collapse = "_")
  df[, paste(cond)] <-  apply(obj@meta.data[, cond, drop = FALSE],1, paste, collapse = "_")
  df[, paste(cond)] <- factor(df[, paste(cond)])

  gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(df, id.vars = paste(cond, collapse = "_"), variable.name = "group")
  gsvaResFlat[, paste(cond)] <- factor(gsvaResFlat[, paste(cond)], levels = lev)
  
  g1 <- ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = paste(condition, collapse = "_"), y = "value",
    color = paste(condition, collapse = "_"))) +
    geom_violin()+
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    #ggplot2::geom_jitter(size=0.0) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~group, scale = "free_y",
                        ncol = ncol) +
    #ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format')+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
    labs(title = title, y = "Scaled Counts", x = cond)+
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
  g1
}
```

## K2T Analysis

11/29

```{r}
K2res <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_29_k2res_e7386_imm_sct_scaledata_F_k2tax_full.RDS"))
dendro <- K2dendro(K2res)
ggdendro::ggdendrogram(dendro) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20))

#K2dashboard(K2res, analysis_name = "12_02_4nqo_e7386_imm")
```

```{r}
library(dendextend)
labels_colors(dend = dendro) <- c("#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00BA38", "#B79F00", "#00BA38", "#00BFC4", "#00BFC4", "#F8766D",  "#FF64B0", "#FF64B0")

d1=color_branches(dendro,  k = 7, col = c("#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#00B4F0", "#B79F00", "#00BFC4", "#FF64B0")) %>% set("branches_lwd", 4)  %>% set("labels_cex", 3)
plot(d1)
```

```{r eval=F}
png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/12_04_k2t_dendro_imm.png"),
    width     = 6,
    height    = 3.5,
    units     = "in",
    res       = 200,
    pointsize = 6)
plot(d1)
dev.off()
```

innate only

```{r}
library(K2Taxonomer)
K2res <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/09_21_k2res_e7386_imm_inn_clusters_sct_scaledata_F_k2tax_Full.RDS"))
dendro <- K2dendro(K2res)
ggdendro::ggdendrogram(dendro) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20))


library(dendextend)

d1=color_branches(dendro,  k=4, col = c("darkgreen","blue","red","black"), groupLabels = c("ILC/NK-T/Mono./DC", "Early Neutro.", "Late Neutro", "DC/Macro"))
plot(d1)

#K2Taxonomer::K2dashboard(K2res)
```


Heatmap on early vs. late GE in neutro clusters

```{r}
earlyneurotime <- toupper(c("Lyz2", "Retnlg", "Lgals3", "Mmp8", "Ly6g"))
lateneurotime <- toupper(c("Il1b", "Ccl6", "H2-D1", "Dusp1", "Junb", "Ifitm1", "Fxyd5", "Ifitm2", "Malat1", "Btg1", "Jund", "Srgn", "Csf3r"))

neutro_sub <- subset(e7386_imm, seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,6,9,11,14) & treatment != "control")
neutro_sub$seurat_clusters <- factor(neutro_sub$seurat_clusters, levels = c(1,3,6,9,11,14))
neutro_sub$treatment <- factor(neutro_sub$treatment, levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
table(neutro_sub$treatment, neutro_sub$seurat_clusters)

DoHeatmap(object = neutro_sub, features = c(earlyneurotime, lateneurotime), group.by = "treatment", group.bar = T, )
DotPlot(object = neutro_sub, features = c(earlyneurotime, lateneurotime), group.by = "seurat_clusters")+ ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))
```

```{r}
mat <- as.matrix(neutro_sub@assays$SCT@data[c(earlyneurotime, lateneurotime), ])
```

```{r pdata.annotation}
annot <- neutro_sub@meta.data %>% 
  dplyr::select(cell_id, treatment, seurat_clusters)  
```

### Heatmap {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

```{r ComplexHeatmap}
hm_annot <- ComplexHeatmap::HeatmapAnnotation(
  Treatment = factor(ifelse(annot$treatment == "4NQO control", "4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386"), levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386")),
  Cluster = annot$seurat_clusters,
  col = list(Treatment = c("4NQO control" = "red",
                       "4NQO + E7386" = "lightpink"),
             Cluster = c("1"="white",
                         "3"= "red",
                         "6"="black",
                         "9"= "gray",
                         "11"= "brown",
                         "14"= "maroon")
  ))
  
neutro_sub$treatment <-  factor(ifelse(neutro_sub$treatment == "4NQO control", "4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386"), levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386"))
rel_prop(obj = neutro_sub, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
```


```{r}
hcopt <- function(d, HC=NULL, method = "ward", members = NULL){
  require("cba")
  if ( is.null(HC) ) {
    HC <- hclust(d,method=method,members=members)
  }
  #optimal leaf ordering
  ORD <- order.optimal(d,merge=HC$merge)
  HC$merge <- ORD$merge
  HC$order <- ORD$order
  HC
}


```

![Heatmap](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/10_30_neutro_heatmap.png)



```{r eval=F}
mat_mod <- t(scale(t(mat)))
rownames(mat_mod) <- stringr::str_to_title(rownames(mat_mod))

png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/10_30_neutro_heatmap.png"),  
    width     = 7,
    height    = 5,
    units     = "in",
    res       = 300,
    pointsize = 8)
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat_mod,
        name="Gene\nExpression",
        top_annotation=hm_annot, 
        cluster_rows=F,
        row_dend_reorder = F,
        cluster_columns=T,
        clustering_distance_columns="euclidean",
        clustering_method_columns="ward.D", 
        column_split=annot$seurat_clusters,
        show_parent_dend_line=TRUE,
        row_title="",
        row_split = rep(c("Early", "Late"),c(5,13)),
        show_column_names=F,
        show_row_names=T)
dev.off()


hc.row <- hcopt(as.dist(1-cor((mat_mod))), method="ward.D")


ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat_mod,
        name="Gene\nExpression",
        top_annotation=hm_annot, 
        cluster_rows=F,
        row_dend_reorder = F,
        cluster_columns=T,cluster_column_slices = T,
        clustering_distance_columns="euclidean",
        clustering_method_columns="ward.D", 
        column_split=annot$seurat_clusters,
        show_parent_dend_line=TRUE,
        row_title="",
        row_split = rep(c("Early", "Late"),c(5,13)),
        show_column_names=F,
        show_row_names=T)
```

### Confusion Matrix

```{r}
neutro_mye <- e7386_imm_inn@meta.data[(e7386_imm_inn$seurat_clusters %in% c(10,5,8,9,1,3) & e7386_imm_inn$singleRcelltype=="Neutrophils"), c('cell_id', 'seurat_clusters'), drop=F]

neutro_all <- e7386_imm@meta.data[(e7386_imm$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,11,9,6,14) & e7386_imm$singleRcelltype=="Neutrophils"), c('cell_id', 'seurat_clusters'), drop=F]
names(neutro_all) <- paste("all_", names(neutro_mye), sep = "")


neutro_all$mye_seurat_clusters <- neutro_mye[neutro_mye$cell_id %in% neutro_all$all_cell_id, 'seurat_clusters']

table(neutro_all$all_seurat_clusters, neutro_all$mye_seurat_clusters)

table(neutro_all[neutro_all$all_seurat_clusters %in% c(1), 'all_cell_id'] %in% neutro_mye[neutro_mye$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,9), 'cell_id'])
table(neutro_all[neutro_all$all_seurat_clusters %in% c(1), 'all_cell_id'] %in% neutro_mye[neutro_mye$seurat_clusters %in% c(10,5,8), 'cell_id'])
```


Stacked barplot for comparisons in the K2T dendro

```{r}
e7386_imm$k2class <- ifelse(e7386_imm$seurat_clusters %in% c(13,5,1,8), "Adaptive", 
                            ifelse(e7386_imm$seurat_clusters %in% c(10,12,2,7,4), "APCs", "Neutrophils"))

rel_prop(e7386_imm, cond2 = "treatment", cond1 = "k2class")

# New line plot for rel. prop
imm_cells <- data.frame(prop.table(table(e7386_imm$k2class, e7386_imm$treatment), margin = 1))
imm_cells$Var1 <- factor(imm_cells$Var1)
imm_cells$Var2 <- factor(imm_cells$Var2)
colnames(imm_cells) <- c("Sub-type", "Treatment", "Rel. Prop")
g <- ggplot(data=imm_cells, aes(x=Treatment, y=`Rel. Prop`, group=`Sub-type`, color=`Sub-type`)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#F564E3", "#B79F00", "#00B4F0"))+
  geom_line(size =1)+
  geom_point(size =3) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), 
        axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size=8), axis.text.y.left = element_text(size=10, face = "bold")) + NoLegend()
g

g <- ggplot(data=imm_cells, aes(x=`Sub-type`, y=`Rel. Prop`, group=Treatment, color=Treatment)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("gray", "red", "salmon", "lightpink"))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_line(size =1)+
  geom_point(size =3) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), 
        axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size=8), axis.text.y.left = element_text(size=7, face = "bold")) + NoLegend()
g


#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_06_imm_relprop_sub.png"), width = 4, height = 2, dpi = 300)
```   

```{r eval=F}
K2res_imm <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_29_k2res_e7386_imm_sct_scaledata_F_k2tax_full.RDS"))

gsva_res_imm <- K2Taxonomer::K2gSet(K2res_imm)
```

## Neutrophils (Final)

### Recluster

```{r eval=F}
neut <- subset(e7386_imm_inn,  singleRcelltype == "Neutrophils")

neut <- PercentageFeatureSet(neut, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
neut <- NormalizeData(neut, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
neut <- FindVariableFeatures(neut, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(neut)
neut <- ScaleData(neut, all.genes)
#e7386_obj <- RunPCA(e7386_obj, features = VariableFeatures(object = e7386_obj), verbose = FALSE)


# run sctransform
neut <- SCTransform(neut, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE)
neut <- RunPCA(neut, verbose = FALSE)
ElbowPlot(neut)

neut <- RunUMAP(neut, dims = 1:3, verbose = FALSE)

neut <- FindNeighbors(neut, dims = 1:3, verbose = FALSE)
neut <- FindClusters(neut, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.4, random.seed = 5678, algorithm = "leiden")

DimPlot(neut)

saveRDS(neut, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/06_01_4nqo_e7386_neutro_seurat.rds"))
```


### Early vs. Late neurotime 

#### GSVA


```{r eval=F}
earlyneurotime <- toupper(c("Lyz2", "Retnlg", "Lgals3", "Mmp8", "Ly6g"))
lateneurotime <- toupper(c("Il1b", "Ccl6", "H2-D1", "Dusp1", "Junb", "Ifitm1", "Fxyd5", "Ifitm2", "Malat1", "Btg1", "Jund", "Srgn", "Csf3r"))

e7386_imm_inn_neut <- subset(e7386_imm_inn, seurat_clusters %in% c())
genesets <- list(early=earlyneurotime, late=lateneurotime)
cpm_counts <- neut@assays$RNA@data
gsva_res <- GSVA::gsva(cpm_counts, genesets, parallel.sz=4, mx.diff=F)
gsva_res_mod <- data.frame(t(gsva_res))
#saveRDS(gsva_res_mod, file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/07_02_4nqo_e7386_gsva_neuro_mx-F.RDS"))
#saveRDS(gsva_res_mod, file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/06_01_4nqo_e7386_gsva_neuro.RDS"))
```

### Boxplot

```{r}
neut <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/06_01_4nqo_e7386_neutro_seurat.rds"))
gsva_res_mod <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/06_01_4nqo_e7386_gsva_neuro.RDS"))

gsva_res_mod$treatment <- neut$treatment[match(colnames(neut), rownames(gsva_res_mod))]
gsva_res_mod <- gsva_res_mod[gsva_res_mod$treatment != "control", ]

gsvaResT <- gsva_res_mod
condition <- "treatment"
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "value",
   fill="treatment")) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    #ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values=c("red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~pathway, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5 ) +
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
   geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
   ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g1

#ggsave(plot = g1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/07_02_gsva_neut.png"), width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
### Jonckhree Test

```{r}
library(PMCMRplus)
gsva_res_mod$treatment <- factor(gsva_res_mod$treatment, levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_res_mod$late, gsva_res_mod$treatment, "less") # reduces upon treatment
PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_res_mod$early, gsva_res_mod$treatment, "greater") # increases upon treatment
PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_res_mod$early, gsva_res_mod$treatment, "two.sided")
PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_res_mod$late, gsva_res_mod$treatment, "two.sided")
```

### PointRange plot

```{r}
ggplot2::ggplot(gsva_res_mod, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "early",
   fill="treatment")) +

 geom_pointrange(stat = "summary",
                  fun.ymin = min,
                  fun.ymax = max,
                  fun.y = "median", size = 1)

  ggplot2::ggplot(gsva_res_mod, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "late",
   fill="treatment")) +
 geom_pointrange(stat = "summary",
                  fun.ymin = min,
                  fun.ymax = max,
                  fun.y = "median", size = 1)
  
  
# on a melted df  
g <- ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "value",
    fill="pathway", color="pathway")) +
  geom_pointrange(stat = "summary", fun.ymin = min,
                  fun.ymax = max,
                  fun.y = "median", size = 1) +
   geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red") +
   ggplot2::theme_bw() +
   ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00BFF0", "turquoise4")) +
   ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values=c("#00BFF0", "turquoise4")) +
   ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)) +
   ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8)) +
  # ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none") +
   ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/10_30_gsva_neutro_ptrange.png"), width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

### Heatmap

```{r}
gsva_res <- readRDS(file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/06_01_4nqo_e7386_gsva_neuro.RDS"))
#gsva_res <- readRDS(file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/09_29_gsva_inn_imm_neuro.RDS"))
gsva_res <- data.frame((gsva_res))
#gsva_res <- gsva_epi[,c("Cell_Cycle", "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia",  "CSC_Curated")]
gsva_res$seurat_clusters <- e7386_imm_inn$seurat_clusters[match(gsub(x = rownames(gsva_res), pattern = "\\.", replacement = "-"), colnames(e7386_imm_inn))]

#heatmap on only clusters that are neutrophil labeled
gsva_res <- gsva_res[gsva_res$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,5,8,10),]
gsva_res$seurat_clusters <- factor(gsva_res$seurat_clusters)
gsvaResT <- gsva_res
condition <- "seurat_clusters"
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")

gsva_mean <- gsvaResFlat %>% group_by(seurat_clusters, pathway)  %>%
    dplyr::summarize(Mean = mean(value, na.rm=TRUE))

transformed_mat <- xtabs(Mean~., gsva_mean)
attr(transformed_mat, "class") <- NULL #ignore this

transformed_mat <- scale(transformed_mat)

cluster_anno <- levels(gsva_mean$seurat_clusters)

ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(t(transformed_mat)), name = "Mean GSVA scores",  
        column_split = factor(cluster_anno),
        cluster_columns = T,
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_column_slices = TRUE,
        column_title_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12),
        column_gap = ggplot2::unit(0.5, "mm"),
        cluster_rows = F,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        #col = col_fun,
        row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12),
        column_title_rot = 90,
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(foo = anno_block(gp = gpar(fill = scales::hue_pal()(9)))),
        show_column_names = FALSE,
        use_raster = TRUE,
        raster_quality = 4)
```


```{r eval=F}
#### Quantify
neutro_pop <- subset(e7386_imm_inn, seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,5,8,10))
unique(neutro_pop$seurat_clusters)
neutro_pop$seurat_clusters <- factor(neutro_pop$seurat_clusters, levels=unique(neutro_pop$seurat_clusters))

neutro_pop$neutro_type <- ifelse(neutro_pop$seurat_clusters %in% c(5,8), "early", ifelse(neutro_pop$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3), "late", "neutro"))

n1 <- DimPlot(neutro_pop, reduction = "umap", group.by = "neutro_type", split.by = "treatment")
n1
#ggsave(plot = n1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/neutro_split.png"), width = 13, height = 4, dpi = 300)

#cluster ~ treatment
dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(neutro_pop$seurat_clusters, neutro_pop$treatment), margin = 1))
colnames(dat) <- c("cluster", "treatment", "percent")
dat <- dat %>%
   dplyr::group_by(cluster) %>%
   dplyr::mutate(cluster_label_y = 1 - (cumsum(percent) - 0.5 * percent)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

dat$cluster <- factor(dat$cluster)
g2 <- ggplot(dat, aes(reorder(cluster), y = percent, fill = treatment, group=treatment)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_text(aes(y = cluster_label_y, label = round(100 * percent, 2)), col="black", fontface="bold", size=2) +
  xlab("cluster") + theme_bw()
g2

#treatment ~ neutrotype
dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(neutro_pop$treatment, neutro_pop$neutro_type), margin = 1))
colnames(dat) <- c("treatment", "type", "percent")
dat <- dat %>% 
   dplyr::group_by(treatment) %>% 
   dplyr::mutate(cluster_label_y = 1 - (cumsum(percent) - 0.5 * percent)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup()

dat$treatment <- factor(dat$treatment)
g2 <- ggplot(dat, aes(treatment, y = percent, fill = type, group=type)) +
   #geom_line(aes(line_type=cluster_label_y))+
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("lightblue", "salmon", "blue"))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_text(aes(y = cluster_label_y, label = round(100 * percent, 2)), col="white", fontface="bold", size=3) +theme_bw() +  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))
g2

ftest_neutro <- function(samples){
  df1 <- neutro_pop@meta.data
  df1 <- df1[df1$treatment %in% samples,]
  df1$treatment <- factor(df1$treatment, levels = samples)
  tmp <- table(df1$neutro_type, df1$treatment)
  df2 <- data.frame(tmp[,1], tmp[,2])
  colnames(df2) <- colnames(tmp)
  df2 <- df2 %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pval=sapply(
    rownames(df2), function(z) fisher.test(table(df1$neutro_type==z, df1$treatment))$p.value)) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(qval=p.adjust(pval, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(sig=ifelse(qval<=0.01, "***",  ifelse(qval <= 0.05, "*", ""))) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(pval)
  df2

}
ftest_neutro(samples = c("control", "4NQO control"))
ftest_neutro(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"))
ftest_neutro(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
ftest_neutro(samples = c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
```

#### Diffanal between neutro types ~ trt

```{r eval=F}
neut$neutro_type <- ifelse(neut$seurat_clusters %in% c(5,8), "early", ifelse(neut$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3), "late", "neutro"))

Idents(neut) <- neut$neutro_type
neutro_diffanal <- FindAllMarkers(object = neut, test.use ="MAST", assay = "SCT", slot = "data")
neutro_diffanal$gene <-  stringr::str_to_title(neutro_diffanal$gene)

diff_genes <- neutro_diffanal %>% 
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 1 & p_val_adj <= 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

diff_genes

diff_list <- as.list(unstack(rev(diff_genes)))
#names(diff_list) <- paste("group", names(diff_list))

library(hypeR)

HALLMARK <-  msigdb_gsets("Mus musculus", "H", "")
names(HALLMARK$genesets) <- names(HALLMARK$genesets) %>%  strsplit( "HALLMARK_" ) %>% sapply( tail, 1 )
lmultihyp1 <- hypeR(diff_list, HALLMARK, background = nrow(neut@assays$SCT@data))
h1 <- hyp_dots(hyp_obj = lmultihyp1, fdr=0.05, top = 50, merge = TRUE, title = "Hallmark Enrichment", )
h1
#ggsave(plot = h1, filename = file.path(PATH, "results/ctrl_4nqo_ctrl_images/hyper_all.png"), width = 9, height = 5)

REACTOME <- msigdb_gsets(species="Mus musculus", category="C2", subcategory="CP:REACTOME")
names(REACTOME$genesets) <- names(REACTOME$genesets) %>% strsplit( "REACTOME_" ) %>% sapply( tail, 1 )
lmultihyp2 <- hypeR(diff_list, REACTOME, background = nrow(neut@assays$SCT@data))
h2 <- hyp_dots(hyp_obj = lmultihyp2, fdr=0.05, top = 30, merge = TRUE, title = "Reactome Enrichment", )
h2

GO <- msigdb_gsets(species="Mus musculus", category="C5", subcategory="BP")
names(GO$genesets) <- names(GO$genesets) %>%  strsplit( "GOBP_" ) %>% sapply( tail, 1 )
lmultihyp3 <- hypeR(diff_list, GO, background = nrow(neut@assays$SCT@data))
h3 <- hyp_dots(lmultihyp3, fdr=0.05, merge = TRUE, top = 30, title = "GO Biological Process")
h3
```



```{r}
neutro_sub <- subset(e7386_imm, seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,6,9,11,14) & treatment != "control")
neutro_sub$seurat_clusters <- factor(neutro_sub$seurat_clusters, levels = c(1,3,14,6,9,11))
neutro_sub$treatment <- factor(neutro_sub$treatment, levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
table(neutro_sub$treatment, neutro_sub$seurat_clusters)
```

```{r}
neutro_sub$neutrotime <- ifelse(neutro_sub$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3), "late", 
                                ifelse(neutro_sub$seurat_clusters %in% c(6,9), "early", 
                                       "mix"))
neutro_sub$neutrotime1 <- ifelse(neutro_sub$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,14), "late", "early")


neutro_sub$trt_mod <- ifelse(neutro_sub$treatment %in% c('4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg', '4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg'), as.character("E7386"),  as.character(neutro_sub$treatment))
neutro_sub$trt_mod <- factor(neutro_sub$trt_mod, levels = c("E7386", "4NQO control"))

ftest_imm(samples = c( 'E7386', '4NQO control'), obj = neutro_sub, cond1 = "neutrotime", cond2 = "trt_mod")
ftest_imm(samples = c( 'E7386', '4NQO control'), obj = neutro_sub, cond1 = "neutrotime1", cond2 = "trt_mod")

ftest_imm(samples = c( 'E7386', '4NQO control'), obj = neutro_sub, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "trt_mod")
```


From the cytokine paper - https://www-nature-com.ezproxy.bu.edu/articles/s41586-023-06816-9/figures/3
DEGs within neutrophils one vs all between sub neutrophils cytokines

at the cluster level

```{r}
#IFNGa,b
ge_boxplot(genes = c("GBP2", "IFI47", "HERC6", "GBP5", "ISG15"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, lev = c(1,3,14,6,9,11), title = "IFNGa,b")

#IL1A,B
ge_boxplot(genes = c("CXCL3", "CXCL2", "CISH", "SRGN"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 4, lev = c(1,3,14,6,9,11), title = "IL1a,b")

#TNF
ge_boxplot(genes = c("SOD2", "MARCKSL1", "MAPKAPK2", "CCL3"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 4, lev = c(1,3,14,6,9,11), title = "TNF")

#GM-CSF
ge_boxplot(genes = c("HBEGF", "SDAD1", "FFAR2", "CAR4", "F2RL2"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, lev = c(1,3,14,6,9,11), title = "GM-CSF")
```

at the NT group level

```{r}
#IFNGa,b
ge_boxplot(genes = c("GBP2", "IFI47", "HERC6", "GBP5", "ISG15"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "neutrotime1", ncol = 5, lev = c("early", "late"), title = "IFNGa,b")

#IL1A,B
ge_boxplot(genes = c("CXCL3", "CXCL2", "CISH", "SRGN"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "neutrotime1", ncol = 4, lev = c("early", "late"), title = "IL1a,b")

#TNF
ge_boxplot(genes = c("SOD2", "MARCKSL1", "MAPKAPK2", "CCL3"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "neutrotime1", ncol = 4, lev = c("early", "late"), title = "TNF")

#GM-CSF
ge_boxplot(genes = c("HBEGF", "SDAD1", "FFAR2", "CAR4", "F2RL2"), obj = neutro_sub, cond = "neutrotime1", ncol = 5,  lev = c("early", "late"), title = "GM-CSF")
```

```{r}
VlnPlot(neutro_sub, features = c("IFNG", "IL1B", "TNF"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", pt.size = 0, assay = "SCT", slot = "scale.data")
```

## T-cells

### Genes of Interest

```{r}
tcells <- subset(e7386_imm, singleRcelltype %in% c("T cells", "Tgd") & treatment != "control")
tcells$treatment <- factor(tcells$treatment, levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))

tcells$trt_mod <- ifelse (tcells$treatment %in% c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), as.character("E7386"), as.character(tcells$treatment))

#new "CD4", "CD8A", "PDCD1", "CTLA4"
v1 <- VlnPlot(tcells, features = c("CD4"), group.by = "trt_mod", assay = "SCT", slot = "scale.data", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = c("red", "salmon", "lightpink")) + ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label = 'p.format') +NoLegend()+ theme(plot.margin = margin(0.1,0.1,2,0.1, "cm")) 
v2 <- VlnPlot(tcells, features = c("CD8A"), group.by = "trt_mod", assay = "SCT", slot = "scale.data", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = c("red", "salmon", "lightpink")) + ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label = 'p.format')+NoLegend()+ theme(plot.margin = margin(0.1,0.1,2,0.1, "cm")) 
v3 <- VlnPlot(tcells, features = c("PDCD1"), group.by = "trt_mod", assay = "SCT", slot = "scale.data", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = c("red", "salmon", "lightpink")) + ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label = 'p.format')+NoLegend()+ theme(plot.margin = margin(0.1,0.1,2,0.1, "cm")) 
v4 <- VlnPlot(tcells, features = c("CTLA4"), group.by = "trt_mod", assay = "SCT", slot = "scale.data", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = c("red", "salmon", "lightpink")) + ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label = 'p.format')+NoLegend()+ theme(plot.margin = margin(0.1,0.1,2,0.1, "cm")) 

g <- ggpubr::ggarrange(v1,v2,v3,v4, ncol = 4, nrow = 1) 
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/2024_03_10_tcell_genes.png"), width = 18, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

### GSVA T-cell Sig.
03/10

```{r eval=F}
enr_custom <- readxl::read_excel(path = file.path("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/CBMrepositoryData/otherStudies/scRNAseq/lung/2022_08_04_SherrD_SnyderM_10X_0223_CD45+_complete/processed_data/ciber_imm_sigs_mouse_final list for sorting.xlsx"), sheet = 2, range = readxl::cell_rows(1:57))
enr_tcells <- enr_custom

enr_res <- apply(enr_tcells, 2, function(x) toupper(x))
list_enr <- apply(enr_res, 2, function(x) list(x))
list_enr$X <- NULL
#remove NAs
list_enr_new <- lapply(list_enr, function(x) unique(x[[1]])[!is.na(unique(x[[1]]))])
names(list_enr_new) <- paste("ciber_", names(list_enr_new), sep = "")

tcell_sig <- list_enr_new[names(list_enr_new) %in% c("ciber_T cells CD8", "ciber_T cells CD4 naive", "ciber_T cells CD4 memory resting", "ciber_T cells CD4 memory activated")]
tcell_gsva <- data.frame(t(GSVA::gsva(as.matrix(e7386_imm@assays$SCT@counts), tcell_sig)))
saveRDS(tcell_gsva, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2024_09_04_4nqo_e7386_gsva_tcell.rds"))
```

```{r}
tcell_gsva <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2024_09_04_4nqo_e7386_gsva_tcell.rds"))
tcell_gsva_mod <- tcell_gsva[rownames(tcell_gsva) %in% colnames(tcells@assays$SCT),]

tcell_gsva_mod$treatment <- tcells$treatment[match(rownames(tcell_gsva_mod), colnames(tcells))]
tcell_gsva_mod <- tcell_gsva_mod %>% filter(treatment != "control")
tcell_gsva_mod$trt_mod <- ifelse (tcell_gsva_mod$treatment %in% c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"), as.character("E7386"), as.character(tcell_gsva_mod$treatment))

tcell_gsva_mod <- tcell_gsva_mod[!names(tcell_gsva_mod)=="treatment"]
gsvaResT <- tcell_gsva_mod
condition <- "trt_mod"
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "pathway", y = "value",
    fill="trt_mod")) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    #ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values=c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values=c( "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
   ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g1

#ggsave(g1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/2024_03_10_tcell_modules.png"), width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Macrophages

```{r eval=F}
macro_sub <- subset(e7386_imm,  singleRcelltype %in% c("Macrophages"))

macro_sub <- PercentageFeatureSet(macro_sub, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
macro_sub <- NormalizeData(macro_sub, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
macro_sub <- FindVariableFeatures(macro_sub, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(macro_sub)
macro_sub <- ScaleData(macro_sub, all.genes)
#e7386_obj <- RunPCA(e7386_obj, features = VariableFeatures(object = e7386_obj), verbose = FALSE)


# run sctransform
macro_sub <- SCTransform(macro_sub, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE)
macro_sub <- RunPCA(macro_sub, verbose = FALSE)
ElbowPlot(macro_sub)

macro_sub <- RunUMAP(macro_sub, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)

macro_sub <- FindNeighbors(macro_sub, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
macro_sub <- FindClusters(macro_sub, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.4, random.seed = 5678, algorithm = "leiden")

DimPlot(macro_sub, group.by = "seurat_clusters")
DimPlot(macro_sub, split.by = "treatment")

saveRDS(macro_sub, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_05_25_macro_4nqo_e7386.rds"))
```

```{r}
macro_sub <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_05_25_macro_4nqo_e7386.rds"))
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(table(macro_sub$treatment))
colnames(df) <- c("Treatment", "Number")

g <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = "Treatment", y = "Number")) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  #geom_text(aes(label=Number), vjust=1.6, color="white", size=3.5) +
  geom_label(aes(label=Number), fontface = "bold")
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/macro_barplot.png"), width = 3, height = 2, dpi = 300)
```


GSVA on ciber

```{r}
enr_custom <- readxl::read_excel(path = file.path("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/CBMrepositoryData/otherStudies/scRNAseq/lung/2022_08_04_SherrD_SnyderM_10X_0223_CD45+_complete/processed_data/ciber_imm_sigs_mouse_final list for sorting.xlsx"), sheet = 2, range = readxl::cell_rows(1:57))
enr_tcells <- enr_custom[,c("Macrophages M0", "Macrophages M1", "Macrophages M2")]

enr_res <- apply(enr_tcells, 2, function(x) toupper(x))
list_enr <- apply(enr_res, 2, function(x) list(x))
list_enr$X <- NULL
#remove NAs
list_enr_new <- lapply(list_enr, function(x) unique(x[[1]])[!is.na(unique(x[[1]]))])

gsva_macro_sub <- GSVA::gsva(expr = macro_sub@assays$SCT@data, gset.idx.list = list_enr_new, parallel.sz=4)
gsva_macro_sub <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_macro_sub))
#saveRDS(gsva_macro_sub, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/06_01_gsva_macro_ciber.rds"))

gsva_macro_sub$seurat_clusters <- macro_sub$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(macro_sub), rownames(gsva_macro_sub))]
```

Unique only 

```{r}
library(UpSetR)
listInput <- list(M0=list_enr_new$`Macrophages M0`, M1=list_enr_new$`Macrophages M1`, M2=list_enr_new$`Macrophages M2`)
upset(fromList(listInput), line.size = 0.25)

listInput$M0 <- list_enr_new$`Macrophages M0`[!list_enr_new$`Macrophages M0` %in% c(list_enr_new$`Macrophages M1`, list_enr_new$`Macrophages M2`)]
listInput$M1 <- list_enr_new$`Macrophages M1`[!list_enr_new$`Macrophages M1` %in% c(list_enr_new$`Macrophages M0`, list_enr_new$`Macrophages M2`)]
listInput$M2 <- list_enr_new$`Macrophages M2`[!list_enr_new$`Macrophages M2` %in% c(list_enr_new$`Macrophages M1`, list_enr_new$`Macrophages M0`)]

upset(fromList(listInput), line.size = 0.25)
```

```{r eval=F}
gsva_macro_sub <- GSVA::gsva(expr = macro_sub@assays$SCT@data, gset.idx.list = listInput, parallel.sz=4)
gsva_macro_sub <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_macro_sub))
#saveRDS(gsva_macro_sub, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/06_01_gsva_macro_ciber.rds"))
```

```{r}
gsva_macro_sub <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/06_01_gsva_macro_ciber.rds"))

gsva_macro_sub_box <- gsva_macro_sub[,1:3]
gsva_macro_sub$seurat_clusters <- macro_sub$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(macro_sub), rownames(gsva_macro_sub))]
gsva_macro_sub_box$treatment <- macro_sub$treatment[match(colnames(macro_sub), rownames(gsva_macro_sub_box))]

gsvaResT <- gsva_macro_sub_box
condition <- "treatment"
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "value",
    color = "treatment")) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~pathway, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5 ) +
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
   geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
   ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g1

#ggsave(plot = g1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/gsva_imm_ciber.png"), width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)

g <- ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "value",
    fill="pathway", color="pathway")) +
    geom_pointrange(stat = "summary") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red") +
    ggplot2::theme_bw() +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values=c("green1", "green3", "green4")) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values=c("green1", "green3", "green4")) +
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)) +
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8)) +
  # ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/10_31_gsva_mphage_ptrange.png"), width = 5, height = 3.5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}

library(PMCMRplus)
#gsva_res_mod$treatment <- factor(gsva_macro_sub_box$treatment, levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
gsva_macro_sub_box_mod <- gsva_macro_sub_box[gsva_macro_sub_box$treatment!= "control", ]
gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$treatment <- factor(gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$treatment, levels = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))

PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$`Macrophages M0`, gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$treatment, "two.sided")
PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$`Macrophages M1`, gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$treatment, "two.sided")
PMCMRplus::jonckheereTest(x = gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$`Macrophages M2`, gsva_macro_sub_box_mod$treatment, "two.sided")
```

Heatmap

```{r}
#gsva_res <- readRDS(file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/09_29_gsva_inn_imm_neuro.RDS"))
gsva_res <- gsva_macro_sub

#heatmap on only clusters that are neutrophil labeled
#gsva_res <- gsva_res[gsva_res$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,3,6,9,11,14),]
gsva_res$seurat_clusters <- factor(gsva_res$seurat_clusters)
gsvaResT <- gsva_res
condition <- "seurat_clusters"
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")

gsva_mean <- gsvaResFlat %>% group_by(seurat_clusters, pathway)  %>%
    dplyr::summarize(Mean = mean(value, na.rm=TRUE))

transformed_mat <- xtabs(Mean~., gsva_mean)
attr(transformed_mat, "class") <- NULL #ignore this

transformed_mat <- scale(transformed_mat)

cluster_anno <- levels(gsva_mean$seurat_clusters)

ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(t(transformed_mat)), name = "Mean GSVA scores",  
        column_split = factor(cluster_anno),
        cluster_columns = T,
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_column_slices = TRUE,
        column_title_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12),
        column_gap = ggplot2::unit(0.5, "mm"),
        cluster_rows = F,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        #col = col_fun,
        row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12),
        column_title_rot = 90,
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(foo = anno_block(gp = gpar(fill = scales::hue_pal()(9)))),
        show_column_names = FALSE,
        use_raster = TRUE,
        raster_quality = 4)
```

```{r}
new_clust_macro <- c("M2", "M1", "M2", "M2", "M0", "M1")

levels(Idents(macro_sub)) <- new_clust_macro

macro_sub$new_macro_clust <- Idents(macro_sub)
macro_sub$new_macro_clust <- factor(macro_sub$new_macro_clust, levels = c("M0", "M1", "M2"))

DimPlot(macro_sub, group.by = "new_macro_clust")

rel_prop(obj = macro_sub, cond1 = "sample", cond2 = "new_macro_clust")
rel_prop(obj = macro_sub, cond1 = "treatment", cond2 = "new_macro_clust")
```
```{r}
DotPlot(macro_sub, features = c( "TNF", "IL1A", "IL1B", "IL6", "NOS2", "TLR2", "TLR4", "CD80", "CD86"), group.by = "new_macro_clust") +  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
DotPlot(macro_sub, features = c("CSF1R", "MRC1", "PPARG", "ARG1", "CD163", "CLEC10A", "PDCD1LG2",  "RETNLA"), group.by = "new_macro_clust") +  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
